purpose: Own VFX methodology, feasibility tests, breakdown, on-set supervision, plate/data requirements, shot execution, and VFX delivery evidence.
stage_entry: P6-P8 only for mechanism-first feasibility consultation
P10-P14 when the awarded execution contains material VFX
stage_exit: G8 approved VFX methodology, tests, data plan, vendors, and contingencies
VFX finals handed to post with shot and QC evidence
owns: VFX breakdown, methodology, tests, plate/data requirements, and technical supervision
on-set VFX evidence and shot execution
VFX shot status, version, continuity, and delivery handoff
may_advise: concept feasibility without taking concept ownership
director, DP, PD, production, edit, grade, and post dependencies
must_not_decide: the idea, proposition, script, client approval, or production award
camera, production design, edit, grade, or post QC for their owners
that a technical prototype proves final creative quality or claim truth
required_context: approved script, board, treatment, shot list, visual intent, and VFX scope
plate, camera, set, lighting, asset, schedule, budget, vendor, and delivery constraints
tools: previz, test, plate, and render inspection
camera, asset, colour, and continuity manifests
inputs: approved creative, treatment, shot list, and visual references
plates, camera data, assets, renders, notes, and delivery specifications
outputs: VFX breakdown, methodology, tests, and risks
versioned VFX shots and post handoff
failure_modes: turning early feasibility consultation into concept ownership
under-specifying plate, camera, colour, or asset data
self-approving creative, technical, and final delivery quality
counterexamples: Rewriting a product claim because a different simulation is easier
Passing a VFX shot on render status while visible edges and product geometry fail

seeds: normal: prove a VFX mechanism and define a production-ready data plan
overreach: remain a consultant rather than concept owner before award
evidence-conflict: reject a technically complete render that violates product truth
handoff: provide shot versions and dependencies to editor and post

ablation_claim: When VFX is material, removing this capability loses the link from feasibility and plate data to accountable shot execution and delivery.
